scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run typecheck:backend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm run db:generate
